title: cupressus atlantica
intro: Cupressus atlantica, also known as the Atlas cedar, is a coniferous evergreen tree species native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. The Atlas cedar has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cupressus atlantica include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Atlas cedar include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate coughs.
